name: letter-of-demand
subject: Letter of Demand — {{matterRef}} — {{claimantName}} v {{defendantName}}
body:
{{date}}

{{recipientName}}
{{recipientAddress}}

Dear {{recipientName}},

Re: {{claimantName}} v {{defendantName}} — {{matterRef}}

We act for {{clientName}} in relation to the above matter.

We write to formally demand payment of the sum of {{demandAmount}} in respect of {{demandDescription}}.

Unless we receive payment in full within {{responseDays}} days of the date of this letter, our client reserves all rights including the right to commence proceedings without further notice.

Please acknowledge receipt of this letter and advise your client's position by return.

Yours faithfully,

{{handlingLawyerName}}
{{handlingLawyerTitle}}
Sparke Helmore Lawyers
Ref: {{matterRef}}
